title: Charred Uruguayan Mascarpone Bake
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dessert featuring charred mascarpone cheese, inspired by Uruguayan cuisine.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
In a large bowl, beat mascarpone cheese with an electric mixer until smooth. Gradually add granulated sugar, beating until combined.
Beat in eggs one at a time, followed by unsalted butter and vanilla extract.
Gradually add flour mixture to cheese mixture, beating until combined.
Pour batter into a 9x13 inch baking dish, and smooth the top.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until edges are golden brown and center is set.
While the dish is baking, prepare the strawberry topping by hulled and sliced strawberries.
Remove dish from oven and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Return dish to oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until sugar is caramelized.
Let the dish cool for 10 minutes before serving with strawberry topping.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Garnish with additional sliced strawberries if desired.
